name: an unreadable or missing profile path does not crash the enforcer; it falls back to native enforcement so the violation still blocks
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile /no/such/profile.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && echo missing-profile-safe-fallback 1>&2
